steps.title: Spot the precision signal
steps.content: The passage says the Mexica tracked time with "a high degree of ______" and then specifies they "precisely identify the dates" of events like solstices. The blank must mean precision or accuracy.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean a high level of precision. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — precariousness: "a high degree of precariousness" — precariousness means instability or uncertainty, which contradicts the precise tracking described. ✗
  • Choice B — exactitude: "a high degree of exactitude" — exactitude means the quality of being precise and accurate, directly matching "precisely identify the dates." ✓
  • Choice C — resilience: "a high degree of resilience" — resilience means ability to recover from difficulty. The passage describes accuracy of observation, not endurance. ✗
  • Choice D — inconspicuousness: "a high degree of inconspicuousness" — inconspicuousness means being unnoticeable or hidden. The passage never mentions concealment. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
